title.rendered: Introducing OneTree Development Studio: Accelerating OpenBMC Development in MegaRAC OneTree

content.rendered:
AMI is set to introduce a new all-in-one development, configuration, and porting tool, OneTree Development Studio (ODS) in the upcoming MegaRAC OneTree® 2.1 release. This powerful Integrated Development Environment (IDE) and platform customization toolset simplifies the BMC firmware project creation, customization, and deployment process. As a result, it enables higher productivity across engineering teams, reduced time-to-market for silicon projects and reduce the big learning curve about the Yocto or OpenBMC.

Builds On the Strengths of MegaRAC OneTree

OneTree Development Studio builds upon the strengths of MegaRAC OneTree by introducing a centralized, intuitive development environment for BMC firmware engineers, platform developers, and system integrators. Designed for ease of use and flexibility, ODS integrates powerful features that significantly improve the developer experience and streamline the complexities of firmware development by providing seamless interfaces for selecting project creation, feature customization, platform creation, platform configuration, and build optimization.

Benefits of ODS include:

  • A Feature-Rich, Developer-Friendly IDE
  • Simplified Platform Porting for custom board bring-up
  • Complete OpenBMC Development Workflow Support
  • Efficiency Boost and Reduced Development Cycles
  • Graphical UI and Command Line Support

OneTree Development Studio is designed for both technical efficiency and business impact. Business leaders can benefit from increased productivity through time and resource savings in their go-to-market strategy. ODS enables quicker adoption of OpenBMC on new hardware designs and implements standardized frameworks and workflows throughout the entire project lifecycle promoting flexibility and scale for firmware operations. This approach mitigates unexpected environmental changes and reduces risks that can lead to project timeline delays.

Coming in June: Get Ready for MegaRAC OneTree 2.1! 

With OneTree Development Studio, MegaRAC OneTree 2.1 is set to transform OpenBMC firmware development ensuring that enterprises, hyperscalers, and hardware vendors can accelerate time-to-market and optimize development workflows.

Stay tuned for further updates as we get closer to launch!

Want Early Access (available in April) or more details? Contact us today! https://www.ami.com/contact-us/
